_help: Working directories to treat as their own project bucket in the Claude-usage breakdown. A session whose cwd is at or under one of these collapses to it (deepest match wins). Anything not under a listed root falls back to its git repo root, then to the cwd itself — so you only list the sub-apps you want carved out of their repo. Paths may start with ~. Copy this to claude-usage-roots.json (gitignored), edit, and restart qs-daemon.
